classObjective: Use properties of parallel lines and transversals to find unknown angle measures.
workedExamples: 12-7, Example 4 — Find Angle Measures Using Parallel Line Properties
12-7, Example 5 — Solve for Variables in Figures with Parallel Lines
warmUp: If corresponding angles are congruent and one is 3x + 15 and the other is 72, find x
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: corresponding angles theorem; alternate interior/exterior theorems; consecutive interior angle theorems; solving for variables
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice finding unknown angle measures using parallel line properties
independentPractice: Practice problems solving for unknown angles in parallel line/transversal configurations
assessment: Exit ticket: find all angle measures in a transversal diagram where corresponding angles are 5x + 20 and 7x - 10
capReflection: How does knowing one angle measure in a transversal diagram allow you to find all other angle measures?
